---
title: "Statistical Foundations"
description: "Probability, inference, hypothesis testing, regression, nonparametric methods."
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
---

::: {.topic-card-label}
<span data-topic-count="statistical-foundations"></span> TUTORIALS
:::

# Statistical Foundations

Probability, inference, hypothesis testing, regression, nonparametric methods.
